# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

class ImageProcessingController < ApplicationController
  ALLOWED_FORMATS = %w[jpg jpeg png gif webp bmp tiff].freeze
  MAX_SIZE = 5000
  MIN_SIZE = 1

  def convert_image
    uploaded_file = params[:image]
    format = params[:format]
    width = params[:width]
    height = params[:height]

    unless uploaded_file.present?
      render json: { error: 'No image uploaded' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      return
    end

    unless valid_format?(format)
      render json: { error: 'Invalid format' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      return
    end

    unless valid_dimensions?(width, height)
      render json: { error: 'Invalid dimensions' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      return
    end

    input_path = save_uploaded_file(uploaded_file)
    output_path = generate_output_path(format)

    begin
      convert_with_imagemagick(input_path, output_path, format, width, height)

      if File.exist?(output_path)
        send_file output_path, type: "image/#{format}", disposition: 'attachment'
      else
        render json: { error: 'Conversion failed' }, status: :internal_server_error
      end
    ensure
      cleanup_files(input_path, output_path)
    end
  end

  private

  def valid_format?(format)
    format.present? && ALLOWED_FORMATS.include?(format.to_s.downcase)
  end

  def valid_dimensions?(width, height)
    return true if width.blank? && height.blank?

    width_valid = width.blank? || (width.to_i.to_s == width.to_s && width.to_i.between?(MIN_SIZE, MAX_SIZE))
    height_valid = height.blank? || (height.to_i.to_s == height.to_s && height.to_i.between?(MIN_SIZE, MAX_SIZE))

    width_valid && height_valid
  end

  def save_uploaded_file(file)
    temp_file = Tempfile.new(['upload', File.extname(file.original_filename)])
    temp_file.binmode
    temp_file.write(file.read)
    temp_file.close
    temp_file.path
  end

  def generate_output_path(format)
    temp_file = Tempfile.new(['output', ".#{format}"])
    temp_file.close
    temp_file.path
  end

  def convert_with_imagemagick(input_path, output_path, format, width, height)
    args = [input_path]

    if width.present? || height.present?
      resize_width = width.present? ? width.to_i : ''
      resize_height = height.present? ? height.to_i : ''
      args << '-resize'
      args << "#{resize_width}x#{resize_height}"
    end

    args << output_path

    system('convert', *args)
  end

  def cleanup_files(*paths)
    paths.each do |path|
      File.delete(path) if path && File.exist?(path)
    end
  end
end
